revision.comment: ウィキペディアタウン南山城村にて新規作成
revision.text:
{{Otheruses|京都府南山城村にある津島神社|その他の津島神社|津島神社 (曖昧さ回避)}} {{神社|名称=津島神社|画像=[[File:TsushimaJinja Minamiyamashiro.jpg|250px]]津島神社の鳥居|所在地=京都府南山城村大字北大河原広手24|緯度度=34|緯度分=46|緯度秒=9.02|経度度=136|経度分=1|経度秒=11.08|祭神=金毘羅、菅原道真公|神体=|社格=|創建=不明|本殿=|別名=|札所等=|例祭=|神事=|地図=Japan Kyoto|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E|地図国コード=JP-26}}'''津島神社'''(つしまじんじゃ)は京都府南山城村にある神社。
== 歴史 == 江戸時代に法ヶ平尾には1つの村があり、その村では氏神として津島神社が祀られていた<ref name=":0">南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p 216</ref>。4月と9月の11日にそれぞれ疱瘡神を祀る行事があり、赤飯、洗米、魚、野菜などの供えて祀る風習がある<ref name=":0" />。
== 祭神 ==
* [[大物主|大物主神]]（[[金毘羅権現]]） * [[菅原道真]]
== 年間行事 ==
* 4月11日 春祭り * 6月1日 北野天満宮へ代参 * 9月10日 金毘羅イセキ * 9月11日 秋祭り * 10月25日 天満宮の祭
== 交通アクセス ==
* JR[[関西本線]][[月ケ瀬口駅]]から徒歩4分
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 参考文献 == ・南山城村史編さん委員会、「南山城村史 資料編」、南山城村、2002年
== 外部リンク ==
* [https://yaokami.jp/1261721/ 津島神社 | 八百万の神]
{{DEFAULTSORT:津島神社}} [[Category:南山城村]] [[Category:京都府の神社]]

'''津島神社'''（つしまじんじゃ）は[[京都府]][[相楽郡]][[南山城村]]にある神社。
== 概要 == 江戸時代に法ヶ平尾には1つの村があり、その村では氏神として津島神社が祀られていた<ref>南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.231</ref>。4月と9月の11日にそれぞれ[[疱瘡神]]を祀る行事があり、赤飯、洗米、魚、野菜などの供えて祀る風習がある<ref name=":0">南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.216</ref>。
== 祭神 ==
* [[大物主|大物主神]]（[[金毘羅権現]]） * [[菅原道真]]
== 年間行事 ==
* 4月11日 春祭り * 6月1日 北野天満宮へ代参 * 9月10日 金毘羅イセキ * 9月11日 秋祭り * 10月25日 天満宮の祭

* JR[[関西本線]][[月ケ瀬口駅]]から徒歩4分

津島神社の鳥居 |所在地 = [[京都府]][[相楽郡]][[南山城村]]高尾 | 緯度度 = | 緯度分 = | 緯度秒 = | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = |経度分 = | 経度秒 = | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = | ラベル位置 = left |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主神]]
[[菅原道真公]] |社格 = [[近代社格制度|村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''津島神社'''（つしまじんじゃ）は[[京都府]][[相楽郡]][[南山城村]]高尾にある神社。 == 祭神 == * [[大物主|大物主神]]（[[金毘羅権現]]） * [[菅原道真]] == 歴史 == 江戸時代に法ヶ平尾には1つの村があり、その村では氏神として津島神社が祀られていた南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.231。 == 境内 == * 桜木神社：疱瘡の神を祀っている南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.216 * けとばし地蔵 == 年間行事 == 4月と9月の11日にそれぞれ[[疱瘡神]]を祀る行事があり、赤飯、洗米、魚、野菜などの供えて祀る風習がある南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.216。 * 4月11日　春祭り * 6月1日 　北野天満宮へ代参　 * 9月10日　金毘羅イセキ * 9月11日　秋祭り * 10月25日 天満宮の祭 == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[京都府]][[相楽郡]][[南山城村]]高尾 == 参考文献 == * 南山城村史編さん委員会、「南山城村史 資料編」、南山城村、2002年 == 脚注 == === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つしましんしや}} [[Category:南山城村]] [[Category:京都府の神社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 津島神社 |画像 = [[File:TsushimaJinja Minamiyamashiro.jpg|150px]]

[[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[Category:New-]] [[Category:New-]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Shortest 250 pages as of 2025-02-19]] [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[en:津島神社 (南山城村)]] {{Shrine |Name = Tsushima Shrine |Image = [[File:TsushimaJinja Minamiyamashiro.jpg|150px]]
Torii gate of Tsushima Shrine |Location = [[Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], Takao |LatitudeDegrees = |LatitudeMinutes = |LatitudeSeconds = |N(北緯) or S(南緯) = N |LongitudeDegrees = |LongitudeMinutes = |LongitudeSeconds = |E(東経) or W(西経) = E |MapCode = JP |Map = |LabelPosition = left |Deities = [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]]
[[Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * **Sakuragi Shrine**: Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * **Ketobashi Jizō** == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * **April 11** – Spring Festival * **June 1** – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * **September 10** – Konpira Iseki * **September 11** – Autumn Festival * **October 25** – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]]

[[Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * **Sakuragi Shrine**: Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * **Ketobashi Jizō** == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * **April 11** – Spring Festival * **June 1** – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * **September 10** – Konpira Iseki * **September 11** – Autumn Festival * **October 25** – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}}

Address * [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}} [[Category:New]]

Address * [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:March 25th orphaned pages]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:March 28 orphaned pages]] [[Category:New]]

[[Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:March 25th orphaned pages]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:March 28 orphaned pages]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:retagging the orphans]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:ophans as of March 31]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]]

Torii gate of Tsushima Shrine |Location = [[Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], Takao |LatitudeDegrees = |LatitudeMinutes = |LatitudeSeconds = |N(北緯) or S(南緯) = N |LongitudeDegrees = |LongitudeMinutes = |LongitudeSeconds = |E(東経) or W(西経) = E |MapCode = JP |Map = |LabelPosition = left |Deities = [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]]
[[Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{draft categories| [[Category:New-]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Shortest 250 pages as of 2025-02-19]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]] }} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]] [[en:津島神社 (南山城村)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)}} [[Category:orphaned pages as of April 8]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: 10 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:津島神社 (南山城村) up to rev 91904248
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 津島神社 |画像 = [[File:TsushimaJinja Minamiyamashiro.jpg|150px]]
津島神社の鳥居 |所在地 = [[京都府]][[相楽郡]][[南山城村]]高尾 | 緯度度 = | 緯度分 = | 緯度秒 = | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = |経度分 = | 経度秒 = | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = | ラベル位置 = left |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主神]]
[[菅原道真公]] |社格 = [[近代社格制度|村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''津島神社'''（つしまじんじゃ）は[[京都府]][[相楽郡]][[南山城村]]高尾にある神社。 == 祭神 == * [[大物主|大物主神]]（[[金毘羅権現]]） * [[菅原道真]] == 歴史 == 江戸時代に法ヶ平尾には1つの村があり、その村では氏神として津島神社が祀られていた南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.231。 == 境内 == * 桜木神社：疱瘡の神を祀っている南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.216 * けとばし地蔵 == 年間行事 == 4月と9月の11日にそれぞれ[[疱瘡神]]を祀る行事があり、赤飯、洗米、魚、野菜などの供えて祀る風習がある南山城村史編さん委員会(2002), p.216。 * 4月11日　春祭り * 6月1日 　北野天満宮へ代参　 * 9月10日　金毘羅イセキ * 9月11日　秋祭り * 10月25日 天満宮の祭 == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[京都府]][[相楽郡]][[南山城村]]高尾 == 参考文献 == * 南山城村史編さん委員会、「南山城村史 資料編」、南山城村、2002年 == 脚注 == === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つしましんしや}} [[Category:南山城村の建築物]] [[Category:南山城村の歴史]] [[Category:京都府の神社]]

Torii gate of Tsushima Shrine |Location = [[Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], Takao |LatitudeDegrees = |LatitudeMinutes = |LatitudeSeconds = |N(北緯) or S(南緯) = N |LongitudeDegrees = |LongitudeMinutes = |LongitudeSeconds = |E(東経) or W(西経) = E |MapCode = JP |Map = |LabelPosition = left |Deities = [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]]
[[Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine Ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|津島神社 (南山城村)|version=91904248|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:orphaned pages as of April 8]] }} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]] [[Category:Buildings in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:南山城村の歴史]]

[[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine Ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|津島神社 (南山城村)|version=91904248|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] }} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[sn:Tsushima Shrine (Minamiyamashiro Village)]] [[Category:Buildings in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro Village]]

[[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q56346690]] Wikidata name: Tsushima-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |Name = Tsushima Shrine |image = File:TsushimaJinja Minamiyamashiro.jpg |Location = [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], Takao |LatitudeDegrees = |LatitudeMinutes = |LatitudeSeconds = |N(北緯) or S(南緯) = N |LongitudeDegrees = |LongitudeMinutes = |LongitudeSeconds = |E(東経) or W(西経) = E |MapCode = JP |Map = |LabelPosition = left |Deities = [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]]
[[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine Ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = |prefecture ={{ill|Minamiyamashiro|qid=Q1203714}} |coordinates ={{Coord|34.761643|N|136.026707|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|津島神社 (南山城村)|version=91904248|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] }} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[Category:Buildings in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro Village]] {{wikidata link|Q56346690}}

Address * [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|津島神社 (南山城村)|version=91904248|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] }} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[Category:Buildings in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro Village]] {{wikidata link|Q56346690}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] {{wikidata link|Q56346690}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q56346690]] Wikidata name: Tsushima-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |Name = Tsushima Shrine |image = File:TsushimaJinja Minamiyamashiro.jpg |Location = [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], Takao |LatitudeDegrees = |LatitudeMinutes = |LatitudeSeconds = |N(北緯) or S(南緯) = N |LongitudeDegrees = |LongitudeMinutes = |LongitudeSeconds = |E(東経) or W(西経) = E |MapCode = JP |Map = |LabelPosition = left |Deities = [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]]
[[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine Ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = |prefecture ={{ill|Minamiyamashiro|WD=Q1203714}} |coordinates ={{Coord|34.761643|N|136.026707|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|津島神社 (南山城村)|version=91904248|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] }} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] [[Category:Buildings in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro Village]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q56346690}}

[[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine Ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = |prefecture ={{ill|Minamiyamashiro|WD=Q1203714}} |coordinates ={{Coord|34.761643|N|136.026707|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * [[:en:Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|Minamiyamashiro Village]], [[:en:Sōraku District, Kyoto|Sōraku District]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]] == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|津島神社 (南山城村)|version=91904248|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] {{wikidata link|Q56346690}} [[Category:Buildings in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro Village]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

{{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} |ShrineRank = [[Modern shrine Ranking system|Village Shrine]] |Founded = Unknown |MainHall = |OtherNames = |AnnualFestival = |Rituals = |prefecture ={{ill|Minamiyamashiro|WD=Q1203714|1=Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto}} |coordinates ={{Coord|34.761643|N|136.026707|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Tsushima Shrine''' (津島神社, Tsushima Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|en|Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|WD=Q1203714|lt=Minamiyamashiro Village|1=Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Sōraku District, Kyoto|en|Sōraku District, Kyoto|WD=Q1154661|lt=Sōraku District|1=Sōraku District, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|WD=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. == Deities == * [[Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Kami]] (worshiped as [[Konpira Gongen]]) * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} == History == During the Edo period, the village of Hōgahirao worshiped Tsushima Shrine as its guardian deityMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.231. == Grounds == * '''Sakuragi Shrine''': Enshrines the deity of smallpoxMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216 * '''Ketobashi Jizō''' == Annual Events == The shrine hosts ceremonies on April 11 and September 11 to honor the deity of smallpox, during which offerings such as red rice, washed rice, fish, and vegetables are madeMinamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee (2002), p.216. * '''April 11''' – Spring Festival * '''June 1''' – Pilgrimage to [[Kitano Tenmangū]] * '''September 10''' – Konpira Iseki * '''September 11''' – Autumn Festival * '''October 25''' – Tenmangū Festival == Location == ; Address * {{ill|Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|en|Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto|WD=Q1203714|lt=Minamiyamashiro Village|1=Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Sōraku District, Kyoto|en|Sōraku District, Kyoto|WD=Q1154661|lt=Sōraku District|1=Sōraku District, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|WD=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}} == References == * Minamiyamashiro Village History Compilation Committee, "Minamiyamashiro Village History: Historical Records Compilation," Minamiyamashiro Village, 2002 == Notes == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{translated page|ja|津島神社 (南山城村)|version=91904248|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:津島神社 (南山城村)]] {{wikidata link|Q56346690}} [[Category:Buildings in Minamiyamashiro, Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:History of Minamiyamashiro Village]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages]]
